case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. JOHNSON, REGINA et al

docket_entries.description: SETTLED - PL. TO FILE JUDGMENT PURS. TO STIP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, REGINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 929 CONNECTICUT ST, S.F, CA. $2,130.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,130.00, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 12NOON 4-13-94. DEF. WARRANTS NO OTHER ADULTS HAVE RIGHT OF POSSESSION. NO FURTHER STAYS. DEF. WAIVES SEC. DEP. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
